pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or meeting the migration requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly define the maven-compiler-plugin version to ensure support for the maven.compiler.release property.
pom.xml.why_exists: The default maven-compiler-plugin version in older Maven distributions (e.g., 3.1) does not support the 'release' flag, causing a build failure.
